title: CHAPTER 18. EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITIES AND SEXUAL HARASSMENT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 18. EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITIES

AND SEXUAL HARASSMENT

Rule 18.1. Statement of policy regarding equal employment opportunities

           The Louisiana Senate seeks to aggressively recruit a highly productive and diverse workforce, and will provide equal employment opportunities to all employees and prospective employees. Decisions regarding the employment, assignment, reassignment, and compensation of individuals shall be made without discriminatory regard based upon race, gender, national origin, disability or age.

           SR 59 of 1997 RS
doc_text:
CHAPTER 18. EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITIES
AND SEXUAL HARASSMENT
Rule 18.1. Statement of policy regarding equal employment opportunities
The Louisiana Senate seeks to aggressively recruit a highly productive and diverse
workforce, and will provide equal employment opportunities to all employees and
prospective employees. Decisions regarding the employment, assignment, reassignment,
and compensation of individuals shall be made without discriminatory regard based upon
race, gender, national origin, disability or age.
SR 59 of 1997 RS
